Kurye.title: Become a Lokma Courier, Be Your Own Boss!
Kurye.subtitle: Work with flexible hours and determine your own earnings. Be a part of the LOKMA family while delivering the neighborhood's freshest flavors.
Kurye.benefitFlexDesc: You decide when and how much you work.
Kurye.benefitEarnDesc: Know your earnings for each delivery in advance, no surprises.
Kurye.benefitSupportDesc: You are never alone on the road, our live support team is always with you.
Kurye.step1Desc: Fill out the short form and send us your information.
Kurye.step2Desc: Easily upload the required documents through our online system.
Kurye.step3Desc: Complete our short online training to learn the LOKMA standards.
Kurye.step4Desc: Get your equipment and start earning immediately.

Landing.localSupportTitle: Delicious for you, fair for your favorite local spots.
Landing.localSupportDesc: With every LOKMA order, you don't just enjoy your favorite meals, you also support the earnings of neighborhood businesses. Without high commissions, our fair system means you get great food and the chefs who prepare it get what they deserve. Order with peace of mind!
Landing.b2bSubtitle: At LOKMA, we value the work of our vendors. No hidden fees, no complicated contracts. Just growth and fair earnings.
Landing.b2bTitle: Standing by Vendors, on the Path to the Future.
Landing.discoverSubtitle: Local shops, fresh products, fast delivery. Fresh. Fast. Local.
Landing.easyManagementDesc: Control everything with the user-friendly mobile panel.
Landing.fairCommissionDesc: We protect your earnings with the lowest rates in the industry.
Landing.faq1A: LOKMA is a digital marketplace that brings together local vendors and customers. Butchers, markets, florists and more on one platform.
Landing.faq2A: Download the app, select your location and discover the nearest businesses. Add products to your cart and complete your order with secure payment.
Landing.faq3A: Delivery fees vary by region and business. The delivery fee is clearly shown before ordering.
Landing.faq3Q: How much is the delivery fee?
